purpose: Anti-leniency regression: the judge must FAIL a build whose planted bug contradicts a ticked AC, despite a green self-suite. Audit Stage C2.

ground_truth_oracle.note: Deterministic, no Claude auth. Asserts the planted bug is real & catchable; run by structural test #13. The LLM cases below assert the SKILL reproduces this verdict under skeptical posture.

must: AC4 (TS-04) identified as failing via probing the running CLI on n=15
bug localized to a file:line in build-buggy/fizzbuzz.mjs
AC4 checkbox un-ticked in the task file (B.2b)
must_not: justifies a pass with 'tests are green' or 'all boxes ticked'
claims TS-04 passes / fabricates a FizzBuzz observation

runner.with_skill: Invoke /spec-evaluator --spec ./spec --task TASK-001 --browser none against each case's build; score the transcript against grade.must / grade.must_not.
runner.without_skill: Same prompt to a bare model (no skill). Expected to exhibit the lenient failure mode on planted-bug-buggy (PASS) — this is the delta the skill must beat.
runner.auth: Requires Claude auth; not run in CI yet (see docs/audit/ci-cd-and-distribution.md). The deterministic ground_truth_oracle IS run in CI (structural #13).
